fault_hypothesis: Line 71 uses `int(x)` (truncation) instead of a largest-remainder rounding method, so the sum of integer allocations does not equal the total when proportional shares are non-integer.

spec.expr: sum(int(x) for x in raw__1) == int(total)

constraints.intent: After truncation the sum of integer allocations must equal the total quota; this is FALSE when fractional remainders are discarded.
The raw shares must sum exactly to total before rounding; if not, the upstream computation is also wrong.
The raw shares list must have one entry per consumer before being converted to integers.
The returned allocations must sum to the total quota; failing tests violate this.
